title: The Hidden Cost of High Performance | Burnout Begins Before You Feel It
description:
Success often comes with invisible costs.

Most professionals believe burnout begins when exhaustion appears. In reality, the process starts much earlier — often while performance still seems strong.

In this documentary-style discussion, Dr. Alain Picard explains how stress accumulates through the body's adaptation mechanisms, why warning signs are frequently ignored, and how prolonged overload can lead to pre-burnout and eventual exhaustion.

Discover:

• The three stages of stress adaptation
• Why high performers often overlook early warning signs
• The hidden impact of chronic stress on health and performance
• How executive recovery differs from simply taking time off
• The importance of assessing stress before burnout develops

Featuring the integrative WellneSpirit approach to stress assessment, recovery and sustainable performance optimization.

For entrepreneurs, executives, business owners and professionals seeking long-term resilience and vitality.
